name: QuasAr2

brightnessData.note: At 0.7 W/cm² and 800 W/cm² (comparable at both intensities)

description: Higher-sensitivity QuasAr variant spike counting and subthreshold event detection.

kinetics.note: Bi-exponential fast components (68% on, 80% off); slow τ_on=11.8 ms, slow τ_off=15.9 ms. n=6 cells
Bi-exponential fast components (62% on, 73% off); slow τ_on=3.2 ms, slow τ_off=4.0 ms. n=7 cells
